subcodes.first_line: O God of Names and Creator of heaven, Who art manifest through the Most Great and Most Exalted Name! I bear witness that Thou hast ever been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء و الظاهر بالاسم الاعظم الاعلی اشهد انک لم تزل
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
